name: quiet-app
reduced_motion: Honor prefers-reduced-motion: keep opacity/instant state; drop transforms and parallax
notes: Minimal motion; use it for continuity loading and state change only.

name: precise-finance
reduced_motion: Reduce to opacity-only; never animate live numbers
notes: Subtle updates; no distracting motion near live values.

name: friendly-consumer
reduced_motion: Drop screen-transition slides and bounce; keep fades
notes: Short feedback and screen transitions; respect reduced motion.

name: calm-cozy
reduced_motion: Soften to gentle opacity; no auto-playing motion
notes: Gentle transitions and small completion feedback; no pressure.

name: kids-positive
reduced_motion: Keep success feedback but remove large bounce and shake

name: snappy-casual
domain: casual puzzle hyper casual mobile game
reduced_motion: Cut combo/reward bursts to a quick fade; keep counters stable
notes: Snappy elastic reward feedback readable in one glance.

name: arcade-bouncy
reduced_motion: Replace confetti/bounce with a brief highlight
notes: Bouncy celebratory bursts but keep controls and text stable.

name: tactical-instant
domain: sci-fi tactical strategy fps hud game
notes: Fast near-instant feedback; data/scan transitions only where meaningful.

name: rpg-material
reduced_motion: Reduce reveal/enchant motion to a fade; keep readability
notes: Material response and rarity highlight used sparingly.

name: period-material
domain: historical period archive museum manuscript ottoman game
reduced_motion: Reduce page drawer and stamp motion to a brief fade or instant state
notes: Physical page drawer stamp or instrument feedback without magical glow.

name: horror-tension
reduced_motion: Remove sudden pulses/flashes; keep essential UI steady
notes: Slow tension and brief danger pulses; never make essential UI unpredictable.

name: racing-kinetic
reduced_motion: Drop speed streaks/shake behind text; keep timers steady
notes: Fast directional transitions; keep speed/timer/lap data readable.
